## Checklist

- [ ] Document follows the standard format (YAML frontmatter + proper sections)
- [ ] Naming convention followed (NES-XXX, LAW-XXX, ADR-XXX, etc.)
- [ ] Cross-references added to related standards
- [ ] Mermaid diagrams render correctly (preview checked)
- [ ] No broken internal links
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated (for significant additions)
- [ ] Appropriate CODEOWNER will auto-request review
